description: 1. 18" length x 12" breadth2. Fit to carry laptopThe bright metallic silver colour teamed with a contrast black on a backpack is a great style statement anywhere you go! The bag comes with three zippers and a small utility pocket on the top, just below the handle strap, to accommodate necessary stationeries. With ample space for your books, notes and even some night-over clothes, apart from your laptop, this backpack seems to be the right answer for your one-stop solution to carry all your things!
